summary: Comprehensive regression testing completed after refactoring the 3850-line monolithic server.py into modular architecture (16 routers, 5 services, 2 model files, 3 core files). All 36 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages tested successfully - Login, Dashboard, Claims, Members, Groups, and Examiner Queue all load correctly with proper data.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/login with demo@fletchflow.com / Demo123! returns access_token
✅ Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user info with valid token
✅ Backend: GET /api/dashboard/metrics returns complete metrics object
✅ Backend: GET /api/plans returns list of plans
✅ Backend: GET /api/members returns list of members
✅ Backend: GET /api/members/eligibility/retro-terms returns retro term monitor data
✅ Backend: GET /api/groups returns list of groups
✅ Backend: GET /api/groups/{id} returns group with pulse analytics available
✅ Backend: GET /api/claims/{id} returns single claim detail
✅ Backend: POST /api/claims creates a new claim with adjudication
✅ Backend: GET /api/cpt-codes/search?q=office returns CPT search results
✅ Backend: GET /api/code-database/stats returns all code stats
✅ Backend: GET /api/prior-auth returns prior auth list
✅ Backend: GET /api/preventive/services returns all preventive services
✅ Frontend: Login page loads and accepts credentials
✅ Frontend: Dashboard loads with metrics cards (22 Total Claims, 4 Pending Review, $983 Total Paid, 59.1% Auto-Adj Rate)
✅ Frontend: Claims page loads and displays claims table with status filters
✅ Frontend: Members page loads with tabs (Census, Reconciliation, Retro-Terms, Age-Out)
✅ Frontend: Groups page loads with group list (15 groups, 1,150 employees, 6 plans)
✅ Frontend: Examiner Queue page loads with queue summary (3 total, 2 pending review, 1 on hold, $13,575 exposure)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: The monolithic server.py (3850 lines) has been successfully refactored into a modular architecture with 16 routers, 5 services, 2 model files, and 3 core files. All API routes remain identical - no URL changes. The refactor is transparent to the frontend. Key architecture: server.py (63 lines) includes all routers under /api prefix. Routers: auth, plans, members, groups, claims, examiner, duplicates, dashboard, reports, edi, codes, network, prior_auth, preventive, settings, audit. Services: adjudication, claims, duplicates, edi_parser, examiner. Core: config, database, auth. Models: enums, schemas.
